siteMetadata.about: I'm a Junior at the Liberal Arts and Science Academy in Austin, Texas and will hopefully be pursuing a degree in Computer Science while in college. I am passionate about Graphic Design (specifically UI/UX), Game Design, and economic implementations of CS (e.g. financial data analysis).

projects.name: Doordle
projects.description: A concept door that opens based on completion of a Wordle puzzle, input of an NFC tag, or OTP on a keypad.

projects.name: Minecraft Plugins
